goals.title: Deliver MENA to the Valley 2026 Cohort
goals.description: 31 founders confirmed. 23 deposits locked, $92K collected. 8 pending ($32K). Two founder dinners and partner meetings now booked in SF, but deposit collection is still below target with 2 days left.

keyResults.text: 8 deposits still pending, $32K outstanding by Apr 15
SF execution week underway with Kate, CloudCom and founder meetings booked

nextActions: Run direct deposit follow-up with the 8 laggards before Apr 15
Convert Sarah Rona, Kate and SF meetings into credibility signals for founders
Attach bank details to remaining founder threads
Finalize virtual mentorship agenda for mid-May
recommendedActions: Prepare a backup plan if remaining 8 deposits are not collected by deadline
Draft a founder spotlight series to maintain engagement pre-immersion
Identify 2-3 additional SF corporate hosts as backup meeting venues

goals.title: Close 3+ Institutional Partnerships
goals.description: Monshaat is signed, HBKU remains in review, and new Money Fellows plus CloudCom/ARPU Plus momentum strengthens the institutional pipeline.

keyResults.text: Monshaat signed and in delivery mode
HBKU partnership still awaiting final update and contract movement
Money Fellows US entry meeting added as a live strategic partnership track

nextActions: Push Nada for HBKU contract movement this week
Convert Money Fellows meeting into a scoped partnership path
Package Monshaat proof into the next partner deck
recommendedActions: Create a partnership pipeline tracker with stage gates
Develop a reusable partnership proposal template from Monshaat success

goals.title: Launch AI Squad with 2+ Corporate Clients
goals.description: NVIDIA content and deck are ready, but no paying client has closed and AI Squad is still reliant on outreach rather than active revenue conversations.
nextActions: Turn the deck into 5 founder-led corporate outreach conversations
Use Money Fellows and CloudCom momentum to test AI Squad adjacency
Package NVIDIA proof into a sharper commercial pitch
Start a weekly AI Squad revenue review until first deal closes
recommendedActions: Identify 3 warm intros from existing network for AI Squad pilot
Create a case study from NVIDIA collaboration to use in outreach
Consider a freemium or pilot pricing model to land first client faster

goals.title: Grow Network to 8,000+ Contacts
goals.description: Database remains at roughly 6,000 contacts, but enrichment is still blocked pending approval and several VIP follow-ups are now overdue.

keyResults.text: Resolve overdue VIP and founder follow-ups before growth push

nextActions: Unblock enrichment approval and process the top 10 strategic contacts first
Clear overdue VIP follow-ups from April 7-8
Add new SF and IMF/World Bank contacts after this week's meetings
recommendedActions: Set up automated enrichment pipeline to avoid manual approval bottlenecks
Create a VIP follow-up cadence to prevent overdue contacts

goals.title: Hit Annual Revenue Target
goals.description: Revenue target is still not formalized in VSDR, but $92K of founder deposits are already in and partnership revenue opportunities are active this week.

keyResults.text: Annual revenue target still needs to be formally defined in VSDR
$92K founder deposits already collected toward Q2 cash generation
Convert current partnership pipeline into contracted revenue

nextActions: Define the annual revenue target inside VSDR this month
Track founder deposits plus partnership revenue in one operating view
recommendedActions: Build a revenue dashboard that combines deposits, partnerships, and AI Squad income
Set quarterly revenue milestones with clear owners

quarterlyGoals.title: Close all MENA to Valley deposits by Apr 15
Convert ARPU Plus / CloudCom into first US partnerships
